tagline: Designing Beautiful Landscapes, One Yard at a Time

hero.headline:
Your Dream Yard, Designed &
Delivered
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should inspire you, not stress you out. iLandscape handles every detail — from design to installation — so you get a landscape that turns heads and lasts for years. Just sit back and enjoy your yard.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Professional Landscape Services That<br class="hidden md:block"> Transform Your Property
services.subtitle: Stop staring at a yard that doesn't reflect your vision. From fresh mulch beds to full hardscape installations, we handle it all so you can enjoy a landscape you're proud of.

cards.title: Mulching & Edge Definition
cards.description: Crisp edge definition and premium mulch application that gives garden beds a clean, polished look while retaining moisture and suppressing weeds.

cards.title: Garden Bed Design & Installation
cards.description: Custom garden beds tailored to your property with the right plant mix, expert soil preparation, and a layout designed for lasting beauty.

cards.title: Patios & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Functional patios and seating areas that create inviting outdoor living spaces for relaxation, family gatherings, and entertaining guests.

cards.title: Walkways & Garden Paths
cards.description: Designed walkways and garden circulation paths that improve flow throughout your landscape while adding visual interest and curb appeal.

cards.title: Drainage Solutions
cards.description: Comprehensive drainage services including decorative features, swales, channels, downspout solutions, and infiltration basins to protect your property.

cards.title: Lawn Maintenance
cards.description: Regular lawn care including mowing, trimming, aeration, and seasonal cleanup to keep your yard looking its absolute best year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision for your outdoor space. We'll visit your property, assess the landscape, and provide a detailed proposal within 48 hours. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our experienced team creates a custom design tailored to your property. Once approved, we handle every detail of the installation — from soil prep to the finishing touches.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Your landscape is transformed into a beautiful, functional outdoor environment. We stand behind every project and offer ongoing maintenance to keep it thriving season after season.

about.label: Why Central Maryland Trusts Us
about.headline: More Than Landscapers — We're Your Outdoor Partners
about.description: Family-owned and serving Central Maryland since 2012, iLandscape brings over a decade of expertise to every project. As proud NALP members with a BBB A+ rating, we approach every yard with the same care and attention we'd give our own. Our values-driven team emphasizes ownership, wisdom, and an unwavering commitment to your satisfaction.

features.title: Licensed Maryland Professionals
features.description: Fully licensed, insured, and holding a Maryland Home Improvement License. Your property is in qualified, trustworthy hands.

features.title: Sustainable Practices Built In
features.description: From permeable patios to eco-friendly drainage solutions, we design landscapes that work with nature — not against it.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any aspect of your project? We'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. That's our commitment to you.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed proposals so you know exactly what to expect — no hidden fees, no unexpected charges.

guarantee.headline: Our "Beautiful Landscape" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any aspect of our work, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charges. We've built our reputation on this promise for over 14 years, and we stand behind every single project we complete.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most new projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope. For smaller services like mulching or cleanup, we can often accommodate same-week scheduling. Contact us and we'll work around your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you provide custom landscape designs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every project begins with a consultation where we learn about your vision, assess your property, and create a custom design. We don't use cookie-cutter templates — your landscape is designed specifically for your space and lifestyle.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold a Maryland Home Improvement License, carry full liability insurance, and are proud members of the National Association of Landscape Professionals. We also maintain a BBB A+ rating.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Upper Marlboro, Bowie, Crofton, Mitchellville, Largo, Fort Washington, Brandywine, Clinton, and surrounding Central Maryland communities. If you're nearby, give us a call — we're happy to discuss your project.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after installation?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer regular lawn maintenance, seasonal cleanup, and garden bed upkeep to ensure your landscape stays beautiful year-round. Many of our clients pair an installation project with a maintenance plan for the best results.

testimonials.name: Jim W.
testimonials.text: iLandscape did a great job cleaning up the yard in my rental property that the tenants had let go. They came and made it look just like brand new.

testimonials.name: Marcus N.
testimonials.text: Excellent, friendly and professional service! A great family business. They truly care about their work and it shows in every detail.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: iLandscape are the truth. Their craftsmanship is impeccable. They are timely and did an excellent job of communicating to me via text throughout the whole project.
